subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #007 Muhammad
subcodes.first_line: Now as to Muḥammad, the people of Europe and America have heard certain tales about the Prophet
subcodes.first_line_orig: اما حضرت محمد ، اهل اروپا و امریکا بعضی روایات از حضرت رسول شنیده‌اند
